body.title: Pipeline cascade match must produce real Igor text, not level name
body.result: 5429d55f — _extract_cascade_content pulls narrative from matched memories. Blob selected_action is now real content, not 'reuse level_name result'. 2 new tests. IGOR_TURN_PIPELINE stays false until voice is fully wired.
body.description: _blob_from_cascade_match sets selected_action to 'reuse level_0_exact_recall result' — a debug label, not a reply. When IGOR_TURN_PIPELINE=true, this becomes the literal channel output. Fix: cascade match path should pass the actual matched memory content/narrative as the selected_action. VoiceProducer stub needs to handle this. ABVoiceProducer should be the default when pipeline is on. Gate: don't enable IGOR_TURN_PIPELINE until this is done.
